Html:
Ever visitited your own homepage using Google Chrome? Is tftpd now malware? If not why is Google reporting it? Also I have a Zscaler account, it also blocks access to it.

I always had a good impression about the tftpd project, it's sad to see it in such a state.

Honestly, is an own site still needed for such a project? Have you considered deleting the site and moving the content from there and from the dying codeplex both to github?
The warning in Chrome is now gone. Did you change something?
